title: habenaria unalascensis subsp. maritima
intro: Habenaria unalascensis subsp. maritima, also known as the Alaskan marsh orchid, is a type of orchid native to the coastal regions of Alaska. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Habenaria unalascensis subsp. maritima include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
